ab: naak a ama wa lhanaz zain Umin.
naak a ina wa lhanaz zain Apin.
iaku thuini a kawash makthin a qamishan.
itia naak a tantuqash ayuzi a minlhafut latata, thithu a lhanaz zain Tuba, thithu thuini a kawash makthin tata wa qamishan.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Tuba，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Tuba, he is 11 years old.

ab: lhmupish iamin isa tataal a lhupilhupishan a taun.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: madaduu iaku numa naak a tantuqash ayuzi a minlhafut maqaquyash.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: madaduu iaku mrauz, ya pangqaiza wa qali, iamin tata wa taun musuun amutusi mrauz.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: mathuaw iaku mushnaw faqlhu a huruy, shduu iamin musuun maqaquyash numa mrauz.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
